special_mechanics.name: Real-time Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses real-time character movement with no tile-grid constraints on player movement. Tiles exist internally for map structure but do not govern character/monster movement

special_mechanics.name: Stacking/Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Objects and items can be stacked to form stairs; some locations require item stacking to reach otherwise inaccessible areas

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Ultima VII is a real-time RPG with free-form movement not constrained by traditional tile grids. Specific physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not documented in available sources and are not typical focus areas for this game genre. Movement is interactive and object-based rather than character-driven platforming mechanics.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ultima VII: The Black Gate
